title: NovaVanillaPBR
description: Resource Pack Realistic that maintains the Vanilla style
body:
New improved vanilla style resource pack, maintains the simplistic vanilla original style of minecraft adding a realistic touch PBR to each item mob block and more in the game.


Format: LabPBR, AO, SSS

NovaVanillaPBR Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nova_vanilla/

NovaVanillaPBR Discord Server: https://discord.gg/MyJVczWZPJ


Make sure these settings are set correctly, or else the textures will get messed up

Requires optifine, recommended settings:

"Quality Settings> Connected Textures" to Fancy

"Quality Settings> Natural Textures" to Off

"Detail Settings> Alternate Blocks" to On

"Performance Settings> Smart Animations" to On
